# Custom Oversized Banners

### Number One Choice For Big Banner Printing

 

![oversized banners bloom realty](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/oversized banners bloom realty.jpg)

 

 

 

 

*   [Product Overview](#8526c2a3-6968-44ac-b5ea-2bfe7dd47234)
*   [Material Options](#a843a38e-23ae-4c60-a515-76e2a7252bb4)
*   [Finishing Options](#47c63508-cbbf-491b-8bb7-681a6a5ceb9b)
*   [Artwork Specs](#62fd51af-8c19-4413-8329-b0672fd2544c)
*   [Production Times](#9522c8ab-be45-4a20-9ffc-39865dcc0425)
*   [Payment Options](#94a3bda4-6047-481d-a7dc-d14ab5d07e97)
*   [Shipping Guidelines](#1585397a-8d8e-459b-b8d1-5d8da6a528ac)
*   [Viewing Distances](#d8655bbf-25d5-457a-a4b7-03ed786128f5)

**_Due to the latest shipping regulations, all oversized banners will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please [contact us](https://www.banners.com/quotes) for a custom freight quote._**

Go big with oversized banners from Banners.com. Ideal for covering large spaces and making a massive visual impact at high-profile locations, our oversized banners offer unmatched visibility and quality.

Our large scale custom banners are digitally printed in full color on durable 13 oz vinyl. They are scratch-proof, and waterproof which makes them very versatile and effective in demanding weather conditions.

Our in-house team provides top-notch customer service and we’re always ready to provide assistance for your large banner printing needs. Browse our options below to get started on your order. Get an instant quote on a oversized vinyl banner in sizes as large as 16' x 50'. Standard production time is three business days.

You can get started on your oversized vinyl banners today by simply uploading your artwork, creating a custom design with one of our free templates, or by selecting the option to have one of our professional designers create your banner.

Large scale vinyl banners are Ideal for building wraps, stadium banners, and large-scale trade shows, our oversized banners deliver maximum visibility and impact.

**Did we answer all your questions?**

If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300), and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Looking for something more specific? [We can customize your order through a custom quote](https://www.banners.com/quotes)! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders.

#### Two Customizable Banner Materials

Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

**13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners**

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.

**Mesh Banners**

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.

#### Vinyl Banner Finishing Options

**Hems & Grommets**

**Reinforced Hems**

**Reinforced Corners**

**Pole Pockets**

![Vinyl Banners Hems and Grommet Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/291886d1-dd6d-4fdf-9f62-c5b6826dba17.jpg)

![Vinyl Banner Reinforced Hem Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Reinforced-Hems-for-Vinyl-Banners.jpg)

![Vinyl Banner Reinforced Corner Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Reinforced Corners for Vinyl Banners.jpg)

![Vinyl Banner Pole Pocket Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/728828a0-b142-4abc-98ec-5b404600dca9.jpg)

These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2-4 feet. 

A thick, weblike material (similar to what is used in seatbelts) is heat-welded to the perimeter of the banner to provide additional reinforcement.

A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to the corners of the banner and secured with grommets to improve both the strength and durability in the corners of the banner.

A pocket or sleeve added to the banner to allow for a dowel or pole to run through it for support. When selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of the banner.

#### Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over to the backside of the banner and heated together to form a clean and strong one-inch hem. We recommend having hems for all banners to increase the strength and durability of the banner.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your banners:

**Top and Bottom Only Hems** - This is our standard finishing option for vinyl banners. The top and bottom of every banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

**All Four Sides Hems** - This is another common finishing option for vinyl banners. All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

![Top and Bottom Grommets Only Example](https://web2printdata.blob.core.windows.net/w2p-cms-1/24-09-04-BANS-Top-and-bottom-hems-and-grommets-only-2.png)

![All 4 Sides Hems & Grommets Example](https://web2printdata.blob.core.windows.net/w2p-cms-1/24-09-04-BANS-Top-and-bottom-hems-and-grommets-all-sides.png)

#### Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2 inches, 3 inches, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner. The vinyl banner material is folded over the backside of the banner similar to hems, but there is room for a pole or rod to go through the pocket.

You will have the following pole pocket finishing options for your banners:

*   **2" Pole Pockets** - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
*   **3" Pole Pockets** - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
*   **4" Pole Pockets** - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3", or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of the banner when you select pole pockets.

\*\*Pole Pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners. Reinforced corners are not available on banners under 2 feet in height.

#### Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for the banner. The corners have a reinforced hem and are grommeted to each corner of the banner. You cannot have reinforced corners with pole pockets.

#### Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a 1 3/16" PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner. The vinyl banner is cut to size, and the reinforcements are heat-welded to the backside of the banner.

We recommend having reinforced hems and reinforced corners on banners over 32 square feet that will be used outdoors or if the banner will be used in a high-wind environment.

\*\*You can not have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

#### Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. For anything larger, please contact us. Double-sided banners can only have pole pockets or hems and grommet finishing.

To learn more, visit our [vinyl banner finishing options](https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banner-finishing-options) page.

\*\*We do not recommend wind slits in banners, therefore, we do not offer them. For more information as to why, visit our [wind slit banners](https://www.banners.com/wind-slits) information page.

#### Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

#### Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

#### Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

#### **1 Business Day Priority:**

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

![1 Business Day Priority Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-1 Business Day Priority.jpg)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **2 Business Days Express:**

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

![2 Business Day Express Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-2 Business Days Express.jpg)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **3 Business Days Standard:**

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard.jpg)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **5 Business Days Saver:**

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver.jpg)

*   **Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### Payment

All oversized banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://www.banners.com/resources/online-orders-pay-with-check)

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

#### General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

#### Shipping Maps

**Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners**

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

**Fabric Banners**

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

#### Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )

Three Day ( 3 Business Days )

Two Day ( 2 Business Days )

Overnight ( 1 Business Day )

UPS Overnight AM

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping, please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

### Oversized Banner Viewing Distances

Oversized banners are intended to be visible from long distances. Consider them to be like billboards that are easily readable from long distances at freeway speeds.That being said, when you view these banners up close or within 10 feet, your banner may appear pixelated or of low quality.

We’ve put together this helpful viewing guide to show you how your banner will look from various distances. Using this guide, you can know what to expect before buying one of these large vinyl banners.

#### **1 foot viewing distance: NOT RECOMMENDED FOR THIS VIEWING DISTANCE**

![Andy's Auto Vinyl Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/DSC_3236 - 1-Foot-600x400.jpg)

#### **3 Foot Viewing Distance:** NOT RECOMMENDED FOR THIS VIEWING DISTANCE

![Andy's Auto Vinyl Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/DSC_3236 - 3-Foot-600x400.jpg)

#### **5 foot viewing distnace:** NOT RECOMMENDED FOR THIS VIEWING DISTANCE

**![Andy's Auto Vinyl Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/DSC_3236 - 5-Foot-600x400.jpg)**

#### **10 foot viewing distance: RECOMMENDED FOR THIS VIEWING DISTANCE**

![Andy's Auto Oversized Banner ](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/DSC_3236 - 10-Foot-600x4001.jpg)

#### **15 foot viewing distance:** RECOMMENDED FOR THIS VIEWING DISTANCE

![Andy's Auto Vinyl Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/DSC_3236 - 15-Foot-600x4001.jpg)

#### **25 foot viewing distance:** RECOMMENDED FOR THIS VIEWING DISTANCE

![Andy's auto vinyl banner ](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/DSC_3236 - 25-Foot-600x4001.jpg)

#### **50 foot viewing distance:** RECOMMENDED FOR THIS VIEWING DISTANCE

**![Andy's Auto Vinyl Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/DSC_3236 - 50-Foot-600x4001.jpg)**

Oversized banners from Banners.com can measure all the way up to 16’ x 50’, making them perfect for stadiums, large scale building wraps, and outdoor events like festivals and street fairs.  These banners come printed in full CMYK colors to allow your design to have that added “pop” factor. Customize your design and choose from finishing options below to complete a big banner that is truly yours.

#### Upload a Print Ready File

## More About Oversized Banners [Return to Top](#top)

Need a banner that commands people's attention from miles away? Then our oversized banners are the perfect fit for you, as they specialize in the realm of distance. From giant stadium advertising to extra-large banner milestone-themed banners, we provide the scaling and quality you need to knock your event out of the park.

Our large-format banners are an exquisite option that is made for both indoor and outdoor use as they are made from our vinyl material designed to hold up regardless of weather. Combining that with full CMYK colors ensures that your graphics get noticed wherever they are displayed.

### We offer two high-quality material options:

*   13-oz. scrim vinyl – Strong and long-lasting, ideal for indoor or outdoor use.
*   8-oz. mesh banners – Designed for windy conditions, allowing airflow while maintaining a crisp, bold design.

### Why Choose Our Oversized Vinyl and Mesh Banners?

*   Custom sizes available—Go as big as 16’ x 50’ or choose a unique size to fit your space.
*   Weather-resistant—Perfect for outdoor banners that need to withstand the elements.
*   Vibrant digital printing—High-quality graphics that stay bright and sharp.
*   Versatile use—Great for building wraps, event backdrops, stage displays, parade banners, and more!

From trade shows and your favorite street festivals to office anniversaries and major promotional campaigns, our big banners make for a perfect fit. They ensure that your messaging has enough space and more, setting the stage for your graphics' grand performance.

## How to Order Your Oversized Banner

### Three Easy Ways to Order Your Oversized Vinyl Banner

**Online Designer**

Create custom vinyl banners with background, clipart images, text, or upload your own graphics.

**Upload a File**

Upload your custom print ready design in formats like .eps, .ai, .pdf, or .jpg for seamless integration.

**Professional Designer**

Collaborate with our expert design team to create a stunning banner. Share your ideas, and we'll bring them to life.

## Frequently Asked Questions [Return to Top](#top)

### What are oversized banners?

Oversized banners are large printed banners that are longer or wider than 8 feet, designed for maximum visibility in big spaces and venues.

### What’s the largest big banner size you offer?

The largest oversized banner size offered is 16' × 50', with custom sizing available to fit your space.

### What’s the smallest size in the oversized banner category?

The smallest oversized banner size is 8.5' × 8.5'. For smaller options, see our Vinyl Banners page.

### What materials are available for your big banners?

Oversized banners are available in 13-oz scrim vinyl for strength and durability, or 8-oz mesh for airflow in windy conditions.

### Should I choose vinyl or mesh for an outdoor banner?

Choose vinyl for durable everyday indoor or outdoor use, and choose mesh for windy locations where airflow helps reduce stress on the banner.

### How are oversized banners printed? 

Big banners are printed in vibrant full color using UV-resistant inks on either 13-oz scrim vinyl or 8-oz polyester mesh.

### Can oversized banners be printed double-sided?

No. Oversized banners are not currently offered double-sided. Double-sided printing is available on smaller banner sizes up to 6' × 30'.

### How do I order a big banner?

You can order by using our online design tool templates, uploading a print-ready file (.eps, .ai, .pdf, .jpg), or working with a Professional Designer.

### What finishing options are available, and how should I install my banner?

Common finishing options include hems and grommets or pole pockets. For hems and grommets, we recommend using ball bungees on all grommets to distribute tension evenly.

### What pole pocket sizes are available, and how close can text be to the edge?

Pole pockets are available in 2", 3", and 4" sizes. Avoid placing text or important artwork within 3 inches of the edge when selecting pole pockets.

### How should I store an oversized vinyl or mesh banner?

Roll the banner with the printed side facing outward and store it in the shipping box to prevent bending or creasing, keeping it away from extreme heat and direct sunlight. Larger banners can be folded if needed, though folding may cause creases that can be removed.

### How do I clean an oversized banner?

Clean using lukewarm water with mild dish soap if needed and soft towels. Avoid abrasive tools such as brushes or power washers.

### How do I remove wrinkles or creases from my big banner?

Unroll the banner and place it in warm sunlight for a few hours, or use a clothing steamer to gently relax creases.

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
